name: Blender Action: Export glTF
description: Creates a Blender action to export scene or selection as glTF/GLB using bpy.ops.export_scene.gltf. Supports GLB/GLTF_SEPARATE/GLTF_EMBEDDED formats and animation export.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]
    gltf_path = inputs.get('gltf_path') or self.get_parameter('gltf_path', '')
    fmt = inputs.get('format') or self.get_parameter('format', 'GLB')
    selection_only = inputs.get('selection_only')
    if selection_only is None:
        selection_only = self.get_parameter('selection_only', False)
    export_animations = inputs.get('export_animations')
    if export_animations is None:
        export_animations = self.get_parameter('export_animations', True)
    action = {
        'type': 'export_gltf',
        'gltf_path': gltf_path,
        'format': fmt,
        'selection_only': bool(selection_only),
        'export_animations': bool(export_animations)
    }
    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added export_gltf action -> {gltf_path} [{fmt}]')
    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
